description_long: This is a two-seater wooden sofa with a rich, dark brown frame and armrests, featuring a deep plum-colored upholstered seat and backrest. The sofa's frame is constructed from wood with visible grain patterns, giving it a classic and sturdy appearance. The seat and backrest cushions are both flat, uniform, and appear to be firmly attached to the frame, providing a clean and structured look. The armrests are wide, rolled, and extend slightly outward, matching the wood finish of the rest of the frame. The legs are short, robust, and positioned at each corner, carved from the same wood as the frame. The overall design is traditional, with a focus on durability and comfort, suitable for public urban spaces such as parks, waiting areas, or outdoor lounges.
description: A classic wooden-framed sofa with plum-colored, attached seat and back cushions, and rolled wooden armrests. The design is sturdy and traditional, with visible wood grain and a structured, comfortable appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the sofa, plum-colored seat and back cushions, and both rolled wooden armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the wooden frame, the depth of the seat, and the profile of the armrest and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous wooden back panel with visible grain, and the sofa's sturdy back legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the armrest profile and the sofa's depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, continuous seat and back cushions, both attached and uniform in size, with no visible segmentation or tufting.
attribute_armrest_style: Present, wide and rolled armrests at each end, matching the wooden frame, extending slightly above the seat height with a smooth, rounded profile.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, robust wooden legs positioned at each corner, carved with a slight outward curve, fully exposed and matching the frame's wood grain.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, continuous backrest with a flat profile, fully upholstered in plum fabric and attached to the frame.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid plum color with a smooth, matte texture and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
